overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showcasing a snowy mountain landscape. The camera begins at a frozen waterfall overlook, descends vertically down the cliff face, and transitions into a first-person perspective flowing downstream through a snow-lined mountain river.

events.description: camera reaches the waterfall edge and begins descending over the cliff

agents.ego_description: moving forward across the snow-covered ground toward the frozen waterfall at the cliff edge

entered.detail: tall frozen waterfall cascading down the cliff face with ice formations
snow-covered rocky terrain on the left side of the overlook
snow-covered rocky terrain on the right side of the overlook
dense evergreen pine trees covering the left mountainside
dense evergreen pine trees covering the right mountainside
tall mountain peak covered in snow visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain overlook with a frozen waterfall ahead. The camera moves steadily forward across snow-covered ground toward the cliff edge, surrounded by dense pine forests on both sides and snow-capped peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical cliff face with snow patches

events.description: camera goes over the waterfall edge and transitions to vertical descent down the cliff
valley with river becomes visible at the bottom of the cliff descent

agents.ego_description: descending vertically down the rocky cliff face alongside the frozen waterfall

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall with patches of snow and ice
river visible at the bottom of the valley below
forest covering the valley floor in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera descends vertically down the cliff face, revealing the textured rock walls with snow patches. The perspective shifts to show the valley river becoming visible below as the descent continues, with the forested valley floor emerging in the distance.

events.description: camera reaches the water surface and transitions to water-level perspective
movement changes from aerial descent to flowing with the river current

agents.ego_description: reaching the valley floor and entering the river, transitioning to a water-level perspective

entered.detail: clear flowing water with visible rocks beneath the surface
snow-covered bank along the left side of the river
large rocks protruding from the river water

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the bottom of the cliff and approaches the river, revealing the snow-covered banks and forested valley. It transitions to water level, entering the flowing river with visible rocks and clear water, shifting from aerial to surface perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-lined mountain river flowing through forest valley

events.description: river current creates ripples and white water patterns as the flow continues

agents.ego_description: flowing downstream through the river, surrounded by snow-covered banks and dense pine forests on both sides

entered.detail: clear flowing water with dynamic ripples and reflections
snow-laden evergreen trees lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily downstream through the clear mountain river, flanked by snow-covered banks and dense pine forests. The water flows over rocks creating ripples and reflections, with the forested valley extending into the distance under a bright winter sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a high mountain overlook and descends into a flowing river valley. It begins by gliding across snow-covered ground toward a frozen waterfall, flanked by dense pine forests and distant snow-capped peaks. As the camera reaches the cliff edge, it plunges vertically down the textured rock face, revealing the forested valley floor and a winding river emerging far below. The perspective then shifts from an aerial descent to a surface-level approach, seamlessly entering the clear water as it reaches the riverbed. Finally, the camera flows steadily downstream, moving over rippling water and reflections while flanked by snowy banks and towering pines under a bright winter sky.
